## Summary

Describe the user-visible behavior and why it is needed.

## Verification

- [ ] New rule behavior follows a red-green-refactor test cycle.
- [ ] Positive, adaptive negative, edge, and suppression cases are covered.
- [ ] `swift test` passes.
- [ ] `swiftlint --strict` passes.
- [ ] Documentation and fixtures contain no private source or local paths.
- [ ] Diagnostic IDs and machine-report schemas remain stable, or the change is documented.

## Precision

For rule changes, list the validation corpus, false-positive review, and any new regression fixture.
